ZA Bank.analysis:
# ZA Bank Top 3 Key Benefits

• **Quick & Easy Account Opening** — Open an account in as fast as 2 minutes with zero deposit requirement, available to both HK residents and visitors entirely online

• **24/7 Banking Availability** — Round-the-clock access to banking services at any time of day, offering maximum convenience for users

• **All-in-One Multi-Currency Management** — Hold and manage **11 different currencies** (HKD, CNY, USD, GBP, SGD, EUR, CAD, AUD, JPY, NZD, CHF) alongside investments and spending — all within a single app
ZA Bank.raw_text:
ZA Bank reminds the public to stay vigilant and guard against criminals who may take advantage of the situation to commit fraud. If you receive a phone call from someone claiming to be a bank staff member, you should verify the caller’s identity and never disclose personal information, bank account details, passwords or any other sensitive data to suspicious individuals. If you are suspicious of an e-mail or a bogus call that claims to come from ZA Bank, please call our anti-fraud hotline 3665 3660 to verify. For more information, please click here.

Manage your finances, investments and spending via one app
One account to manage your global assets
Multi-currency savings: Hold 11 different currencies, including HKD, CNY, USD, GBP, SGD, EUR, CAD, AUD, JPY, NZD, and CHF with ease.
Flexible asset allocation: With savings and time deposits, you can exchange currencies 24 x 7 at your preferred rates, seize market opportunity, and grow your wealth.
Enjoy high-interest savings: A dedicated savings pot designed for your needs - deposit and withdraw anytime with zero fees.
Free cash withdrawals throughout Hong Kong: Withdraw cash for free at over 3,000 Visa ATMs across Hong Kong with your ZA Card5.
Learn more
Your one-stop investment platform
Stocks: Trade stocks with 0 brokerage, 0 custody fees, and platform fee as low as USD 1.99/ HKD 18 per transaction! And enjoy our stock rebate program StockBack. Get stocks for free after successfully purchasing the stocks6.
Crypto: Trade 24 x 7 directly with your HKD or USD deposits. New customers can enjoy $0 platform fee for the first 90 days after account opening7.
Funds: Enjoy 0% subscription fees on ALL funds8 with no cap! Let 100% of your money go into the market.
Learn more
Important risk statement
ZA Card: Spend to earn stocks and choose reward
Hong Kong's first StockBack x ZA Card9: Spending with your card is no longer just about saving up points, but directly getting shares! You can easily accumulate stocks and build your personalised reward package via your daily spending!
Spend to participate in PowerDraw: Win up to a 200% rebate10, along with a chance to share HKD 1 million11 as you receive MillionTix via PowerDraw!
Custom card number: We're the first in Hong Kong to allow you to choose the last 6 digits on your card face!
No annual or hidden fees: A Visa debit card that truly belongs to you, and supports Apple Pay and Google Pay.
Learn more
FPS: Free instant transfers
Free instant transfers, card payments, tax payments, and scan-to-pay all in one app.
Receive HKD and CNY with just your mobile phone number via FPS.
Use the Frequent Payee section on the Transfer page for quick and easy transfers.
Send Group Lai See with one tap and no need to enter recipient individually!
Learn more
Global transfers to over 140+ countries and regions
Payment Connect: Send money between Chinese Mainland and Hong Kong in real-time, with zero fees.
Wise: HKD payments with express remittance by Wise arrive faster than ever!
SWIFT: Transfer directly to 140+ countries and regions via SWIFT with zero ZA Bank fee12.
Learn more
Flexible loans with approval results in as fast as 90 seconds13a
Fast approval, large loan amount: Simple application process, with a loan amount up to HKD 1,000,00013b, and an annualised percentage rate as low as 1.30%13c..
All-rounded solutions: We offer a range of products, including Instalment Loan, Card Statement Instalment, and Debt Consolidation to meet different financial needs.
Market-beating loan offers: Frequently rolls out loan deals to reduce your borrowing costs further.
Learn more
Protect yourself fully with smart insurance in as fast as 3 minutes14
Simple and easy: Get insured in as fast as 3 minutes14 via your smartphone.
Comprehensive coverage: Choose from life insurance, critical illness insurance, and Voluntary Health Insurance Scheme (VHIS) and other options! We're your one-stop shop to meet your every need!
Fully digital process: Apply for a plan or file a claim easily via a fully digital experience.
Learn more
Extreme Security
Unlock ZA Bank App biometrically with your face or fingerprint, every time you log in or perform a transaction. Instantly receive a notification for every high-risk transaction. Lock your ZA Card with one tap if you discover an unauthorised payment, and raise a transaction dispute to avoid any losses. Finally, we aim to protect your privacy, and to create a smart management platform with a high level of protection for all users.

ZA Bank’s core brand spirit of "Your Future Bank for Now" demonstrates our dedication to prioritise “Banking for Web3” and provide the best for our users.

As Hong Kong continues to digitalise across all fronts, we are determined to harness the technological advantages of digital banking to meet our users' needs. We will become their "Future Bank for Now” by bringing brand-new banking products and a service experience ahead of the competition.

Even if the steps we take today may seem insignificant, they will lead us to further innovations and allow us to bring more of the future into the present for our users. As such, we will always strive to bring ground-breaking products, services, and a first-class app interface for a user-friendly experience.

1. As the first digital bank to launch in Hong Kong, ZA Bank had the highest customer deposits and net profit among the city’s eight digital banks as of 30 June 2025. Source: Interim reports of 8 digital banks.
2. The time needed for account opening is subject to actual circumstances. In general, provided that no extra information is required, an user can open an account in as fast as 2 minutes.
3. To cater to everyone's financial needs, such as spending and wealth management, ZA Bank is offering exclusive banking services in Hong Kong.
^ Data is as of 30 June 2025.
4. App Store rating as of 15 December, 2025.
5. Overseas cash withdrawal may incur handling fees.
6. "Stock PowerDraw" Promotion is valid from 1 February 2026 to 30 June 2026, both dates inclusive. Participants who complete a purchase transaction in stocks during the Promotion Period will receive one "Stock PowerDraw" chance. All "Stock PowerDraw" chances will only be valid for 24 hours from issuance by ZA Bank to the Participant and will be forfeited after expiry. If the platform fee for the US stocks purchase transaction is less than USD 2 per transaction, or less than HKD 20 per transaction for HK stocks purchase transaction, Participants will not receive any "Stock PowerDraw" chance. Participants must have the ZA Bank App with version 3.8.9 or above in order to be eligible for the "Stock PowerDraw" chance. In each "Stock PowerDraw" chance, Participants can only receive rewards in the form of "Designated Stock Redemption Coupons", which can be redeemed for stocks ranked in the top 100 by market value in the US stocks market. Terms and conditions apply.
7. From 1 February 2026 till 30 June 2026 (both dates inclusive), customers who have successfully activated crypto trading services for the first time with ZA Bank can enjoy a 0 platform fee offer on crypto trading transaction which is executed within the period of first 90 days upon activation of the service, with no cap. Terms and conditions apply.
8. From now until 31 March 2026 (both dates inclusive), individual users who have activated the investment fund trading services with ZA Bank can enjoy 0% fund subscription fee offer and redemption fee waivers for all funds. Terms and conditions apply.
9. "StockBack x ZA Card" Promotion: The promotion period is from 3 November 2025 to 30 June 2026, both dates inclusive. Each eligible transaction with the transaction amount of not less than HKD 10 by participants who use ZA Card to spend during the promotion period will be entitled to one (1) StockBack Chance, and will not be entitled to any rewards of other ZA Card promotions that involve ZA Coin. All StockBack Chances will be valid for 48 hours. For each StockBack Chance, participants can select one of the six (6) stocks on the StockBack machine on the campaign page as their stock rebate (“StockBack Rewards”), and the amount of reward will be 1% of the transaction amount or a higher rebate amount under limited-time promotions launched by ZA Bank from time to time. Participants must hold a valid investment account and have activated the corresponding investment trading services within 90 calendar days after selecting the StockBack Rewards in order to obtain ownership of and receive the rewards. Otherwise, the rewards will be forfeited and deemed as waived, and ZA Bank will not reissue the rewards. “StockBack x ZA Card”Promotion is subject to its Terms and conditions.
10. Each eligible spending transaction of no less than HKD 10 will be entitled to 1 PowerDraw Chance ("Chance"), and will not be entitled to other ZA Card rebate offers. All Chances are valid for 48 hours. Each Chance may give a rebate up to 200% of the transaction amount or other designated rewards. Probability of each reward is not evenly distributed. Rebate is in a form of ZA Coin. ZA Coin is a third-party reward scheme operated by ZA International Financial Services Limited. The rebate is capped at 1,000,000 ZA Coin (or HKD 10,000) per transaction. Terms and Conditions apply.
11. During the promotional period, users have the chance to get MillionTix by participating in PowerDraw or completing specific quests. ZA Bank will draw 100 of the MillionTix after each round. Users will receive an HKD 10,000 cash reward or other reward of equivalent value for each winning ticket they hold. Millionaire PowerDraw is subject to its Terms and Conditions.

* This also applies to ZA Credit users. To borrow or not to borrow? Borrow only if you can repay!
12. You will not be charged for a ZA Bank handling fee via SWIFT Global Transfer service. For other fees that may apply, please refer to the Fees and Charges Guide for Individual Customers.


13a. This approval result is preliminary. Users are required to submit relevant documents for review before receiving the final result and approval. The actual completion time varies across individuals. In general, provided that all required information is in order, a new-to-bank applicant can get the preliminary approval result in as fast as 90 seconds. An existing bank user can get the preliminary approval result in as fast as 30 seconds from starting an application in the Loan tab after logging into the app.
13b. The final approved loan amount, interest rate and tenor may vary depending on the individual circumstances and the final assessment of the bank.
13c. The Annualised Percentage Rate (“APR”) of 1.30% is calculated based on an example where the loan amount is HKD 1,000,000, with a repayment tenor of 12 months and a monthly flat rate of 0.0584%. Please refer to the interest rate & monthly repayment table shown during the loan application for the applicable monthly flat rate and APR of other tenors. The APR is calculated using the method specified in relevant guidelines issued by the Hong Kong Associations of Banks and is rounded up or down to the nearest two decimal places. The APR is a reference rate, which includes the basic interest rates and other fees and charges (if applicable) of a product expressed as an annualised rate.
14. The whole application time may vary. In general, when the required information is fully prepared, the insurance application can be completed within 3 minutes.
Important risk statement
Investment involves risks. The price of investment products may fluctuate or even become worthless. Past performance is not an indicator of future performance. Losses may be incurred rather than making a profit as a result of investment. The information in this platform is for reference only and does not constitute and should not be regarded as any recommendation, offer or solicitation to purchase or sell any investment products. You should carefully and independently consider whether the investment products are suitable for you in light of your investment experience, objectives, financial position and risk profile. Independent professional advice should be obtained if necessary. Please read the relevant terms and conditions together with the offering document and risk disclosure statements of the investment product before making any investment decisions. The information in this platform has not been reviewed by SFC or any regulatory authority in Hong Kong. ZA Bank is acting as your agent to handle the transaction. The investment product is provided by a third-party but not ZA Bank. In respect of eligible dispute (as defined in the terms of reference for the Financial Dispute Resolution Centre in relation to the Financial Dispute Resolution Scheme) out of the selling process or processing of the related transaction, ZA Bank will enter a Financial Dispute Resolution Scheme process with you. However, any disputes over the contractual terms of the product should be resolved directly between you and the third-party product issuer. The platform is not intended for distribution or use by any person in any jurisdiction, country or region where the distribution or use of this material is restricted and would not be permitted by law or regulation. If you are outside of Hong Kong, we may not be authorised to offer or provide you with the products and services available in the country or region where you are located or resident.
Crypto Disclaimer
Investment involves risks. Virtual asset is a new asset class and developed on the basis of new technology, involving unanticipated risks associated with acquisition, storage, transfer and use. Prices of virtual assets could be highly volatile and investors are reminded to pay extra caution when deciding to invest in virtual assets. The price of virtual assets may fluctuate or even become worthless. Past performance is not an indicator of future performance. Losses may be incurred rather than making a profit as a result of investment. The information in this platform is for reference only and does not constitute and should not be regarded as any recommendation, offer or solicitation to purchase or sell any investment products. You should carefully and independently consider whether the investment products are suitable for you in light of your investment experience, objectives, financial position and risk profile. Independent professional advice should be obtained if necessary. Please read the relevant terms and conditions together with risk disclosure statements before making any investment decisions. In respect of eligible dispute (as defined in the terms of reference for the Financial Dispute Resolution Centre in relation to the Financial Dispute Resolution Scheme) out of the selling process or processing of the related transaction, ZA Bank will enter a Financial Dispute Resolution Scheme process with you. The platform is not intended for distribution or use by any person in any jurisdiction, country or region where the distribution or use of this material is restricted and would not be permitted by law or regulation. If you are outside of Hong Kong, we may not be authorised to offer or provide you with the products and services available in the country or region where you are located or resident.

Important notes from the insurance agent and the insurer

ZA Life Limited (with business name as "ZA Insure") is authorised and regulated by Insurance Authority of the Hong Kong SAR.

ZA Bank Limited ("ZA Bank") is a licensed insurance agency (license number GA1009) authorised by ZA Insure.

All the above insurance product(s) are not products of ZA Bank, bank deposits or bank savings plans. Part of the premium pays for the insurance and related costs. Policyholder is subject to the credit risk of ZA Insure. This product is intended for sale in the jurisdiction of Hong Kong SAR only.

In respect of an eligible dispute (as defined in the Terms of Reference for the Financial Dispute Resolution Centre in relation to the Financial Dispute Resolution Scheme) arising between ZA Bank and you out of the selling process or processing of the related transaction, ZA Bank is required to enter into a Financial Dispute Resolution Scheme process with you. Any disputes over the contractual terms of the ZA Insure's insurance products, ZA Bank will make every effort to provide assistance.

All insurance applications are subject to the underwriting requirements and acceptance of ZA Insure. Before making a decision, please review carefully the product materials issued by ZA Insure, including the Product Brochure and the Policy Provisions, to ensure you understand the features, risks, exclusions, restrictions and the full terms and conditions of the relevant insurance plan.

Depending on the information provided by the potential policyholder and/or the life insured during the online application, ZA Insure reserves the ultimate right to accept or reject any such online application for the selected insurance products offered by ZA Insure.

- 📱 **Exclusive Rebates & Perks with Mox Credit Card** – Partner offer with csl provides new sign-ups or renewals up to **HKD1,380 in rebates** plus a **free NowTV Pass** when setting up Mox Credit Card autopay.

From now until 30 June 2026, new customers can open a Mox Account with the code "CLUBLINK", link your Mox Card to The Club account, and apply for a Mox Credit Card to earn up to HKD1,400 worth of rewards!




CLUBLINK Invitation Code Promotion Terms and Conditions apply. Quota is limited, first come, first served.

Learn more
Welcome Offer
Mox Credit
Mox Zone is now on The Club – enjoy year-round deals

Mox Zone has officially landed on The Club – As a Mox customer, you can now enjoy exclusive year-round discounts on 100+ popular gadgets. Plus free delivery on orders of HKD400 or more!




Quota is limited, first come, first served.

Learn more
Deposits
Asia Miles
Fly farther with Mox Asia Miles Time Deposit

From now, set up a Mox Time Deposit and earn Asia Miles to travel. For example, an Asia Miles Time Deposit of HKD104,000 new fund for 12 months will earn you 26,000 Asia Miles, which is enough for a round-trip flight to Tokyo, Osaka or further destinations! Perfect for a round trip to Asia!



Learn more
Deposits
Unmatched flexibility and competitive rates with FlexiBoost savings💰

New savings solution🎉 With FlexiBoost, you can be confident that your interest rate won't change no matter what happens in the market. Watch your wealth grow as you earn progressively higher interest rates!🚀




Promotion terms and conditions apply.

Learn more
FX Savings / Remit
New FX users get up to HKD175 cash rewards

Trading FX, making investment or sending money overseas? Try Mox FX and earn up to HKD175 cash rewards! 🎉




Terms and Conditions apply.

Learn more
Mox Credit
Unlock your next journey with Mox Credit Card✈️ For all spending HKD4=1 mile + 0 Limits + 0% FX Fees

Seamlessly earn an unbeatable HKD4 =1 Asia Mile on all your spending with Mox Credit Card's Miles Rewards Scheme, so you can earn faster and fly sooner.

Plus, enjoy 0% FX Fees, making every purchase count, whether at home or abroad!

Break free from traditional credit card rewards scheme. With Mox Credit Card, you can switch between CashBack and Asia Miles rewards with ease, putting you in control of how you earn.



Learn more
Mox Credit
Best in town! Enjoy Unlimited CashBack with Mox Credit Card!

You can now earn 2% Unlimited CashBack everywhere with Mox Credit Card. What’s more? You can also earn 3% Unlimited CashBack at supermarkets in Hong Kong!

All your CashBack is in real cash, calculated instantly and credited to your Mox Account daily, start earning now!



Learn more
Mox Credit
Welcome Offer
Get up to HKD1,700 when you join Mox with “MOXTRIP25” – plus up to 2% CashBack on Trip.com bookings!

Earn before you fly! Start cashing in now when you’re planning your next getaway – From now until 30 June 2026, open a Mox Account with code “MOXTRIP25”, apply for a Mox Credit Card, and complete a few simple tasks to pocket up to HKD1,700 in cash rewards.

And that’s not all – every time you book on Trip.com, you can earn up to 2% CashBack with your Mox Credit Card. Travel smarter, earn more!



Learn more
Welcome Offer
Mox Credit
Shop at HKT to get HKD1,400 Cash Rewards!

From now until 30 June 2026, open a Mox Account using the invitation code “MOXHKT25” ,link up your Mox Card, and apply for Mox Credit Card to instantly receive 2,000 Clubpoints! You can even earn cash rewards worth up to HKD1,000 by spending a total of HKD1,000 in one single transaction on your Mox Credit Card at csl shop / 1O1O Center / csl eshop or subscribe HKT service. Total rewards up to HKD1,400!




MOXHKT25 Invitation Code Promotion Terms and Conditions apply. Quota is limited, first come, first served.

Welcome Offer
Autopay your HKT bills and earn HKD1,200 Cash Rewards + up to 2% CashBack!

HKT Autopay Switch, manage your bills hassle-free! You can even earn cash rewards and up to 2% CashBack when switching to autopay at HKT merchants. From now until 31 March 2026, open a Mox Account using the invitation code “MOXBILL25” and apply for Mox Credit Card to get an HKD200 cash reward instantly! You can even earn up to HKD1,000 cash rewards when you complete the bill payment requirements with HKT Autopay Switch in following 4 months. Total rewards up to HKD1,200!




MOXBILL25 Invitation Code Promotion Terms and Conditions apply. Quota is limited, first come, first served.

Learn more
Deposits
Say goodbye to waiting and hello to instant earnings!

Why wait for something you could have right this instant? Unlike traditional banks, Mox pays your interest the exact moment of your deposit, making life just that little bit easier. On top of HKD Time Deposits, you can now earn the same instant interest with our brand-new USD Time Deposit feature.



Learn more 
Borrowing
0% interest* Instant Clear

With Instant Clear, you can now enjoy 0% interest with a one-off fee only on paying other banks’ or financial institutions’ credit card bills of below HKD75,000 in easy instalments of 3 to 6 months - clearing up your external card bills gets easier and more flexible!




*0% interest refers to the monthly fee on Instant Clear application of a repayment period of 3-6 months and a loan amount of below HKD75,000. Please note that a designated one-off fee will be charged, you may refer to the APR and the related fee in the Mox app for details.

WeLab Bank.analysis:
# WeLab Bank – Top 3 Key Benefits

• **Market-Leading Digital Banking Experience** – Recognized as *"Hong Kong's Best Digital Bank"* with multiple prestigious awards, WeLab Bank is the #1 revenue-generating digital bank in Hong Kong, offering customers a trusted and top-tier banking platform.

• **Innovative Payment & Financial Solutions** – Products like **Subscribe+ for Apple Products** introduce cutting-edge, flexible payment methods, giving customers convenient and modern ways to manage purchases and access credit in Hong Kong.

• **Strong, Scalable & AI-Powered Platform** – Backed by **US$220 million in Series D financing** and a strategic AI partnership with Google, WeLab serves **70+ million users** across Asia, ensuring customers benefit from a financially robust, technology-driven bank built for long-term growth and innovation.

WeLab – One of the fastest growing pan-Asian fintech platforms

Today, WeLab has successfully scaled up as a leading pan-Asian fintech platform, operates one of the first licensed digital banks in Asia - WeLab Bank, as well as multiple online financial services with leading positions in Hong Kong, Mainland China, and Indonesia, with over 70 million individual users and over 700 enterprise customers. WeLab uses game-changing technology to help customers access credit, save money, and enjoy their financial journey.

Powered by proprietary risk management technology, patented privacy computing techniques, and advanced AI capabilities, WeLab offers mobile-based consumer financing solutions and digital banking services to retail individuals and technology solutions to enterprise customers. We continue to work tirelessly, every single day, to provide greater convenience and accessibility to financial services.

Airstar Bank.analysis:
# Airstar Bank: Top 3 Key Benefits

• **Fast & Convenient Digital Banking** – Open an account or get a personal loan disbursed in as little as **5 minutes** via mobile, with **24/7 access** to all banking services including transfers, deposits, forex, and stock trading — all in one app.

• **Cost-Effective with No Hidden Fees** – Enjoy **no account management fees, no minimum deposit balance**, free multi-currency transfers (HKD, USD, CNY), and **lifetime $0 commissions on HK stocks**, making it highly accessible regardless of financial status.

• **Comprehensive All-in-One Financial Services** – Offers a wide range of products including **high-interest deposits (HKD/USD/CNY), personalized loans up to 12x monthly salary, real-time forex trading, and diversified stock investments** (HK & US stocks/ETFs), all managed seamlessly within a single platform.

Remarks：

1.Visitors are required to be physically present in Hong Kong at the time of account opening application.

2.Annualized Percentage Rate ("APR") is calculated in accordance with the method set out in the relevant guidelines referred to in the Code of Banking Practice and rounded up or down to the nearest two decimal places. APR is a reference rate which includes the basic interest rate and other fees and charges (if applicable) expressed as an annualized rate. The APR ranges from 7.43% to 35.05% with repayment period of 6 to 60 months. The example below is for illustrative purpose only. For a loan amount of HKD800,000 with 12 months repayment period with the APR being 7.43%, the total loan repayment amount is HKD831,497.86 (handling fee waived). Please refer to "Airstar Personal Instalment Loan Terms and Conditions" for details. This example and the resulting calculations do not constitute a quote or offer from the Bank and is not binding on the Bank. Approval of the APR is subject to the final decision of the Bank. The offer is subject to limited quota. In case of any dispute, the Bank reserves the right of final decision. The Bank reserves the right to change details (including terms and conditions) under the "Personal Instalment Loan" or to suspend or terminate the "Personal Instalment Loan" at any time in its absolute discretion without prior notice.

3.Loan amount up to 12x of monthly salary or HKD1,000,000 (whichever is lower).

4.According to individual circumstances, the Bank reserves the right to request customers to provide additional supporting documents for approval. The approval time required is subject to real situation.

5. $0 commissions on HK stocks forever offer has no expiration for accounts that have already obtained eligibility. Participation is limited to accounts opened during the promotion period (based on the system-recorded time). The start/end date, adjustments, or extensions of the promotion period shall be subject to the platform's page announcements or official notifications at that time.

Risk Disclosure:

Currency conversion risk – Foreign currency exchange is subject to exchange rate risk. Customers may incur losses due to currency fluctuations at the time of currency conversion. CNY currency risk - CNY is currently not freely convertible and is subject to prevailing regulatory requirements. The actual conversion arrangement will depend on the applicable restrictions at the relevant time.
